profile-pre-filled: If your profile was already on the leaderboard, it is possible that some of these links have been pre-filled.
gd-ul-notice: To link your Global Stats Viewer account to a Geometry Dash account, you need to be on the Updated Leaderboard to link your discord account to your GD account.
gd-ul-notice-2: If you're not on UL, the website will simply say that your GD account doesn't exist.
gd-ul-linking: Once on UL, you can click on link and GSV will automatically check if you own the account or not. This only works if both are linked to the same Discord account.
gd-ul-learn-more: Learn how to get on the Updated Leaderboard here:
gd-ul-request: Make use to use /request in case you have a "You do not own this Geometry Dash account" error
gd-ul-wait-until-import: If you still can't link to your GD account after a UL link, please wait until we import new UL data, this usually happens every 24 hours.
gd-ul-still-cant-link: If you still can't link to your GD account after a UL import, contact a staff member.
aredl-pemonlist-notice: As long as you have your AREDL account and/or Pemonlist account linked with the same Discord as your Global Stats Viewer account, your accounts will be linked after clicking the Link button.
pointercrate-notice: To link your Global Stats Viewer account to a Pointercrate account, you need to create an account with Pointercrate by accessing the Pointercrate User Area.
pointercrate-notice-2: If you have not done so already, you must claim your demonlist player on your Pointercrate account. Player claiming is the process of associated a demonlist player with a Pointercrate user account. A verified claim allows you to link your account to Global Stats Viewer.
pointercrate-notice-3: To initiate a claim, click the pen left of the 'Claimed Player' heading. Once initiated, you have an unverified claim on a player. These claims will then be manually verified by members of the Pointercrate team. You can request verification in
pointercrate-notice-4: You cannot initiate a claim on a player that already has a verified claim by a different user on it.
pointercrate-account-example: Below is an example of a verified Pointercrate account:
pointercrate-access-token: Once you have had your claim verified, you can copy your Pointercrate access token from the Profile tab. Do not share this token with anyone!
pointercrate-access-token-2: Finally, enter your access token in the
pointercrate-linking-instructions: After this, you should be able to enter your Pointercrate demonlist username on the account linking page and click on the Link button.
